report.summary: Created 2 OG images for new FHE and x402 guide pages, added Breadcrumb + BackToTop + reading time badges to both, fixed duplicate borderLeft bug on x402 page, standardized related links section to card grid, added table accessibility attributes.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: FHE Guide: Added Breadcrumb navigation (Home > Learn > FHE Crypto Guide 2026)
FHE Guide: Added '16 min read' badge for reading time estimate
FHE Guide: Added BackToTop scroll component
FHE Guide: Added role='table' and aria-label to FHE vs ZK vs TEE comparison table for screen reader accessibility
x402 Guide: Added Breadcrumb navigation (Home > Learn > AI Agent Payments & x402 Guide)
x402 Guide: Added '16 min read' badge for reading time estimate
x402 Guide: Added BackToTop scroll component
x402 Guide: Fixed duplicate borderLeft style bug (line 206 had '#22c55e20' overwritten by '#22c55e')
x402 Guide: Converted Related Learning section from plain underlined links to glass card grid (matching FHE page pattern for cross-page consistency)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: fhe-crypto-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG+PNG) — purple/indigo theme with encrypted computation flow diagram, lock icon, 4 stat cards (Zama valuation, FHE funding, current TPS, 2026 target)

OG image: ai-agent-payments-x402-guide (1200x630 SVG+PNG) — cyan/green theme with x402 payment flow diagram (Agent → Server 402 → USDC Payment → Base L2 Settle), 4 stat cards (transactions, volume, settlement, avg fee)

sections.title: Consistency Fixes
items: Both new pages now follow the standard learn article UX pattern: Breadcrumb > Badges (with read time) > Content > Related Links (card grid) > Disclaimer > BackToTop
Related links section on x402 page converted from underlined text links to glass card grid for visual consistency with FHE page and other learn articles
